name: Mondo Bizarro Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place garlic, basil, parsley, and spinach in a blender.
2. Work into a uniform paste.
3. Add tomatoes and process just a few seconds longer.
4. Transfer to a bowl and stir in Parmesan, salt, and nuts.
5. Serve at room temperature with hot pasta drizzled with olive oil.
